spec_match.rationale: The lab now probes the exact named view timeline contract: `view-timeline-name`, `timeline-scope`, and `animation-range: scroll 0% scroll 100%`.

interactive.rationale: The top/middle/bottom controls update the CSS and JavaScript progress bars, and the inactive-timeline button exposes a real ViewTimeline edge case.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now frames the lab as a named view-timeline compatibility check instead of a broad scroll-timeline probe.

edge_cases.rationale: The lab includes stylesheet injection for the exact declaration pair and a hidden-subject ViewTimeline inactive probe.

references.rationale: The page now includes the required ChromeStatus link for feature 6522328437620736.

design_system.rationale: The rebuilt lab uses shared CSS variables and has no source inline handlers, source inline styles, raw hex colors, `@scroll-timeline`, or `scroll(nearest block)`.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp at `/v147/timeline-named-range-scroll/compatibility-lab/?verify=after-timeline-final`: five exact probes render, top/middle/bottom controls update CSS and JS progress, the hidden-subject inactive branch stays visible, old scroll-timeline text is absent, the ChromeStatus link is present, and the console has no warnings or errors.
